problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Combining Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
